creator: aryeh.friedman@gmail.com
text:
This is currently being worked on (see -x11@ for details).   There are 
several things that need to happen before ff 3.0 is ported:

    * Many of the linux ports it depends are too old to be used by ff 3.0
    * Some other ports also need to be updated
    * ff 3.0 needs to be tested on the major desktops in use in the 
FreeBSD world

-- 
Aryeh M. Friedman, FloSoft Systems
http://www.flosoft-systems.com
Java developer, unit testing, and operatring system development

	"Free Software != Free Beer"
